name: Innovative Composites International Inc.
summary: Innovative Composites International Inc. manufactures and sells lightweight structural products utilizing fiber reinforced thermoplastics for use in the housing, transportation, and composite panel industries. The company offers prefabricated modular housing products, such as The Bungalow, a 922 square feet home that includes 3 bedrooms, a living room, kitchen, 4-piece bath, and additional storage area for 2-6 occupants; The Cabin, a 2-bedroom modular home at 559 square feet for 1-4 occupants; and The Cottage, a 474 square feet layout with 2 bedrooms and a combination living room/dining area for 1-4 occupants. It also provides lightweight shelter and storage modules under the RapTER name; and a proprietary reinforced thermoplastic facing material under the RMOR Skin name. The company is based in Toronto, Canada.
